description_long: This is a full-size gaming keyboard with a striking black and red color scheme, featuring a standard QWERTY layout with a dedicated numeric keypad and additional function keys. The keyboard has a robust, angular chassis with pronounced edges and a slightly elevated profile, giving it a modern, aggressive look. Several keys, including the WASD cluster, arrow keys, and some function keys, are highlighted in red for quick identification, suggesting a design optimized for gaming. The top edge of the keyboard includes a row of silver-colored media or macro keys, and the right side features additional buttons, possibly for volume or other quick-access functions. The surface appears to be made of hard plastic with a matte finish, and the keycaps are clearly labeled in English. No visible cable or wireless receiver is attached, and the keyboard appears to be in new condition with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A full-size black and red gaming keyboard with highlighted WASD and function keys, angular design, and a matte plastic finish. Features a numeric keypad, extra media keys, and clear English key labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, highlighted red keys, and the angular chassis design.
description_view_1: Angled left-side view emphasizing the depth, side contours, and the red accent keys.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the keyboard's width, back edge, and the arrangement of the top row keys.
description_view_3: Angled right-side view highlighting the numeric keypad, side buttons, and additional red accents.
